extract: Hydro Cannon (Japanese: ハイドロカノン Hydro Cannon) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation III. It is TM154 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet and TM159 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. Along with Blast Burn and Frenzy Plant, Hydro Cannon is one of the ultimate moves. All fully evolved Water-type first partner Pokémon can learn this move.
